item.title: Starmer’s Chief of Staff Resigns, Citing Role in Hiring Friend of Epstein
item.description: The Labour official was ensnared in a scandal after helping appoint Peter Mandelson as Britain’s ambassador to the U.S.

item.title: Live Updates: Japan’s Leader Set for Big Win in Snap Election
item.description: Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi was on course for a sweeping mandate from voters for her economic policies and tough stance on immigration and China.

item.title: Portugal Votes for President, With Leftist Set to Beat Surging Far Right
item.description: Polls predict a comfortable victory for António José Seguro, but a nationalist’s presence in the runoff showed that Portugal is not immune to Europe’s...

item.title: Breezy Johnson’s celebration is muted by Lindsey Vonn’s crash.
item.description: Johnson won her first Olympic gold medal after her teammate Vonn crashed early in her run.
